startUrls.title: Website URLs
startUrls.description: Business website homepages to scan for trust, SEO, contact, and conversion weaknesses.

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Websites
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of websites to scan.

requestTimeoutSecs.title: Request Timeout Seconds
requestTimeoutSecs.description: Maximum time to wait for each website request.

enableCharging.title: Enable Pay-Per-Event Charging
enableCharging.description: Enable only after Apify Store paid events are configured for this Actor.

useProxy.title: Use Apify Proxy
useProxy.description: Enable only if your Apify account has Proxy access or target websites block direct requests.
